title: SuperSpeed
description: A modpack designed to run Minecraft at super speed without sacrificing visual quality or gameplay performance.
body:
# SuperSpeed Modpack: Blazing Fast, Flawlessly Smooth Take your Minecraft experience to the next level with the **SuperSpeed Modpack**, a performance-enhancing collection of mods designed to maximize game speed without sacrificing quality. Whether you're exploring vast biomes or building complex structures, this modpack ensures you enjoy seamless gameplay with faster frame rates and reduced lag—all while preserving the stunning visuals Minecraft is known for. ## Tested at Maximum Settings: For this comparison, both Minecraft with and without the modpack were tested at the highest possible settings: a **32 chunk render distance**, **32 chunk simulation distance**, and **Fabulous graphics settings**—every option maxed out. Despite the heavy load, the SuperSpeed Modpack allows Minecraft to run smoother and faster, eliminating frame drops and delivering fluid performance. ## Compare the Difference: On the left is vanilla Minecraft at these extreme settings, where performance tends to struggle. On the right is Minecraft with the SuperSpeed Modpack, where the game runs effortlessly, retaining its high-quality visuals while handling the most demanding configurations. ![Performance Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8fabc07acc2d3ddb2b764b347b519b926948a6.png)
Settings Images Check out the images below for a glimpse of the maximum settings used during testing, showcasing the impressive capabilities of the SuperSpeed Modpack. ![Settings 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e36e228af20058e6e53bf6bfb518d89e97343d36_0.webp) ![Settings 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/875439c0ce41c94667746a4b609cb53c8292138e_0.webp)
